message:
fix(packs): wire up external pack loading from custom_paths

Fixes #24 - the `custom_paths` config option now actually loads external
packs via the ExternalPackLoader.

Changes:
- Add `expand_custom_paths()` to PacksConfig for glob/tilde expansion
- Add ExternalPackStore for runtime storage of loaded external packs
- Add `load_external_packs()` function with OnceLock caching
- Add `check_command_with_details()` for full match info extraction
- Wire up external pack loading in main.rs hook mode
- External packs are evaluated after built-in packs (lower priority)
- External pack keywords are merged into quick-reject set
- Warnings from pack loading are logged in verbose mode

The existing ExternalPackLoader infrastructure was already complete -
this commit just wires it up to the evaluation pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
